name: Atria Oyj
summary: Atria Oyj, together with its subsidiaries, produces and markets meat and food products in Finland, Sweden, Denmark, Estonia, Russia, and internationally. The company provides fresh and consumer packed meat; poultry products; cooking products, such as sausages; cold cuts and spreads; convenience food, including pizza; animal feed; pet food; and vegetable and delicatessen products. It offers its products under the Atria, Sibylla, 3-Stjernet, L√É¬∂nneberga, Aalbaek, Maks & Moorits, VK, W√É¬µro, Pit-Product, CampoMos, and Casademont brand names. The company also exports its products, including beef, pork, chicken, and turkey products. It markets its products to the grocery trade, food service, and concept customers, as well as the food industry. Atria Oyj was founded in 1903 and is headquartered in Sein√É¬§joki, Finland.
